PROP-baseauction-inv-003.text: Callback execution between asset transfer and assetOut pull must not enable double-spend or state manipulation.
PROP-baseauction-inv-003.assertion: forall bid with data.length>0: auctionCallback() cannot re-enter bid() or modify auctionStarts/balances
